stories.headline: Bijan and Gibbs are playin' chicken with the paymasters
stories.read: Two of the best young workhorses alive, Atlanta's Bijan Robinson and Detroit's Jahmyr Gibbs, are starin' down their front offices for a record-settin' payday, and the word on the wire is both fellas have been told to steer clear of the facility 'til the money's right. Don't you spook, pardner: hands that get the ball this many times pay the rent no matter the contract fuss, so these two stay premium first-round claims. But if the standoff drags into camp, keep a spare horse saddled. Tyler Allgeier behind Bijan is cheap insurance the whole saloon's ignorin'. Grab the star, stash the handcuff, sleep easy.

stories.headline: Brian Thomas Jr. and Trevor Lawrence are clickin' again down in Jacksonville
stories.read: Word driftin' up from the Jaguars' summer workouts says Brian Thomas Jr. and Trevor Lawrence have got their connection hummin' again, with the ESPN man on the ground callin' the two downright dialed in. Here's the play, pardner: after a rocky ride last fall, BTJ's been slidin' down draft boards while the herd frets over that down year, and that's exactly how a diamond gets buried in the rough. A healthy quarterback feedin' him a fat cut of the targets is all this young burner needs to gush. Stake your claim before the rest of the outfit remembers what he can do.

stories.headline: Saddle up: the camps swing open and scoutin' season's finally here
stories.read: Mark it down, pardner: the league just set the report dates, with the first wagons rollin' into camp July 17 and every last outfit reported by July 28. That means the dead-quiet stretch is over and the real intel starts flowin', who's runnin' with the first team, who's nursin' a wing, who just leapfrogged the pecking order overnight. This is your window to scout the territory before the great land grab, so watch them position battles like a hawk over a henhouse. The manager who reads the camp wire early stakes the richest claims come draft day.
